data.title: SI-BONE To Present at BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12, 2026
data.description: SI-BONE, Inc., a leading company in developing solutions for compromised bone issues, is set to take part in the 2026 BofA Securities Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas, NV. The event, scheduled for Tuesday, May 12, 2026, will feature a fireside chat by the company's management at 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time/11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SIBN, is known for its innovative procedural approaches to tackle clinical challenges related to bone health.

data.title: Safehold Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) released its first quarter 2026 results, with revenue reaching $110.9 million. The net income attributable to common shareholders for the same period was $28.9 million, translating to earnings per share of $0.40. During Q1'26, Safehold closed $68 million in new originations, including 3 ground leases amounting to $54 million and a leasehold loan for $14 million. Additionally, the company signed 1 Non-binding LOI, with 2 pending, totaling approximately $255 million. Safehold also saw its Estimated Unrealized Capital Appreciation rise to $9.5 billion. The company expressed satisfaction with its investment activity and UCA growth during the quarter. Further details can be found on Safehold Inc.'s official website.

data.title: Universal Display Corporation Announces $400 Million Share Repurchase Authorization and Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.50 per Share
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation unveiled a plan for a $400 million share repurchase program and declared a cash dividend of $0.50 per share for the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: Zeta Global Revenue Growth Accelerates to 50% and “Beats and Raises” for Its 19th Consecutive Quarter on the Heels of the Athena by Zeta™ Launch
data.description: Zeta Global, based in New York, has shown significant growth with a 50% increase in revenue. This marks their 19th consecutive quarter of exceeding expectations and raising forecasts. The positive momentum follows the recent launch of Athena by Zeta™.

data.title: Grid Dynamics Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN), based in San Ramon, California, specializing in enterprise-level AI and digital transformation, has disclosed its performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported first quarter revenues totaling $104.1 million, surpassing the projected range of $103.0 million to $104.0 million. This marks a successful financial outcome for the company during this period.

data.title: Rivian Announces Optimized Capacity Plan for Georgia Plant
data.description: An automotive manufacturer Rivian has revealed plans to boost its annual production capacity to 300,000 vehicles at its upcoming facility in Stanton Springs North, Georgia. This marks a 50% rise from the original target of 200,000 units, aiming to drive down costs per unit and allow for potential expansion. The company expressed enthusiasm about this development.

data.title: Institutional adoption spurs $15+ LINK price prediction as whales go 69% long. $9.66 breakout may lead to 65% rally.
data.description: Whales currently hold 69% of the long positions in LINK, a cryptocurrency. The integration of institutional SWIFT is fueling adoption. LINK is on the verge of a crucial breakout at $9.66, which may lead to a 65% surge to $15. Following a 47% drop from its peak, the cryptocurrency is showing signs of recovery.

data.title: Price prediction for AVAX: Target set at $12 with institutional traders heavily favoring long positions at a 64% ratio.
data.description: AVAX is currently holding steady at $9.12 as institutional traders heavily favor long positions with a ratio of almost 2:1. Analysts predict that a potential breakout above $9.70 could spark a rally towards the resistance level of $12 and beyond.

data.title: Bearish sentiment dominates DOT price as support weakens towards $1.10. Major moving averages breached, pointing to a possible correction ahead. $1.10 is seen as the primary downside target amid negative momentum indicators.
data.description: Polkadot is currently experiencing a technical breakdown below all significant moving averages, indicating a forthcoming deeper correction. Analysts are eyeing a primary downside target of $1.10 as momentum indicators are showing negative signals across the board. This suggests that the cryptocurrency may face further downward movement in the near future.

data.title: MATIC's oversold bounce triggers $0.45 target with 18% upside from current RSI of 38. Imminent relief rally expected in two weeks.
data.description: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for Polygon currently stands at 38, indicating a potential relief rally in the near future that could push the price to $0.45 within a span of two weeks. This projected price target reflects an anticipated 18% increase from the current oversold levels of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: DOGE nears $0.16 as bulls surge, RSI 70.44 with whales at 68.3% long. Resistance at $0.12 critical. $0.16 target in 30 days, 65% chance if momentum holds above $0.
data.description: As the Relative Strength Index (RSI) peaks at 70.44 and major investors hold 68.3% of long positions, the cryptocurrency DOGE is at a crucial juncture testing the $0.12 resistance level. Analysts suggest a potential target of $0.16 within the next 30 days, with a likelihood of 65% if the current momentum remains above $0.

data.title: SOL price could hit $90 in 2 weeks as oversold signals suggest reversal. Bears in control until SOL surpasses $87.50.
data.description: After bouncing from a support level of $81.40, Solana is showing signs of a potential rally towards the $90-95 range. Despite this positive movement, the bears still have control until SOL is able to surpass the $87.50 mark. The oversold momentum indicators add weight to the likelihood of this rally.

data.title: ADA may see a drop below $0.23 support, with potential to test $0.18-0.20 in two weeks. Price currently at $0.25.
data.description: The technical analysis of Cardano indicates a possible decline below the $0.23 support level. Momentum indicators suggest that the cryptocurrency could test the $0.18-0.20 range in the next two weeks. Currently trading at $0.25, the price is showing signs of potential downward movement.

data.title: XRP is currently at $1.37 amidst technical resistance; Analysts project a $1.60 target by June 2026.
data.description: Currently, XRP is experiencing a period of consolidation with a trading price of $1.37. It is encountering resistance due to a bearish technical setup, indicating a sideways trend expected to continue until the second quarter of 2026. Analysts anticipate a moderate increase to $1.60 by the middle of the year if bullish conditions prevail.

data.title: First Solar, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Reaffirms Guidance
data.description: First Solar, Inc., a major PV solar technology and manufacturing company in the US, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: FSLR, reported net sales of $1.04 billion in Q1 2026, showcasing a notable 24% growth from the same period in 2025. This increase was mainly attributed to the rise in module sales to external entities. The first quarter also saw the Company achieve a net income of $347 million. Additionally, First Solar, Inc. reaffirmed its 2026 guidance during this announcement.

data.title: STANDEX REPORTS FISCAL THIRD QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: During the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, there was an 8.1% year-over-year increase in sales, amounting to $224.6 million. Sales of new products experienced a growth of approximately 40%, and sales in fast-growing markets accounted for over 30% of total sales in the same period. Organically, sales saw a 6.5% year-over-year growth, with the electronics sector specifically increasing by 6.8%. The book-to-bill ratio stood at 1.05 during this quarter.

data.title: FiEE, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, FiEE, Inc., a technology company based in Osaka, Japan, reported a revenue of $2.1 million with a strong gross margin of 70.4%. This positive financial performance supported a profit turnaround for the company. FiEE, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FIEE, focuses on integrating IoT, connectivity, and AI technologies to transform brand experiences.
